desc: Delivering NVIDIA-certified AI and Deep Learning courses across Indonesian universities and institutions. Part of the NVIDIA Deep Learning Grant program.
Representing Indonesian youth in AI policy discussions and advocating for ethical AI development in developing nations.
Leading the Indonesian chapter of Coding Collective — empowering 500+ AI practitioners through workshops, mentoring sessions, and open-source collaboration.

role: Teaching Assistant — ML, Big Data, Database
desc: Assisted professors in delivering Machine Learning, Big Data Analytics, and Database Systems courses. Mentored 200+ undergraduate students.
Contributing to open-source tools and datasets for Indonesian language processing, including corpus building for low-resource Nusantara languages.
